name: Erlangmon

signature_move.name: Yōsen Enbu
signature_move.description: Swings theSān Jiān Liǎng Rèn Dāoaround itself, hitting enemies with a circular slash.

description: A God Man Digimon born from the data of a certain warrior from Chinese legend. It acts in accordance with its conviction to rid all Digimon of their wicked hearts, and others refer to it as an upright Digimon due to the way it is honest. A master that wields the Sān Jiān Liǎng Rèn Dāo as freely as its own limbs, it is also accompanied by its sentient treasure tool " Kōtenken " [N 1] , which resembles the head of a giant dog, and cherishes it as its companion, appearing anywhere in an instant regardless of the situation when summoned, and excelling in surprise attacks. In addition, Erlangmon also has a transformation ability that is said to allow it to change into any Digimon. However, while it is capable of perfectly imitating their appearance, it cannot copy their abilities, so this transformation ability is often used for distractions or espionage. Also, the third eye on its forehead has the power to see through the opponent's weak spots and wicked hearts, and together with its ever-changing tactics, it is extremely difficult for those opposing it, or those hiding wicked hearts to escape from its grasp. Its Special Moves are swinging the Sān Jiān Liǎng Rèn Dāo around itself in one sweep, and eliminating enemies in its surroundings with a circular slash ( Yōsen Enbu ), and summoning Kōtenken to crunch the enemy's Digicore ( Shōrai: Kōtenken ).
